title: Talent Acquisition Specialist
description:
Job Summary

The Talent Acquisition Specialist is responsible for managing the end-to-end recruitment process to attract, assess, and hire high-quality talent aligned with the company’s business needs and culture. This role works closely with hiring managers and HR stakeholders to deliver timely and effective hiring solutions.

Key Responsibilities

Talent Acquisition & Recruitment

  • Manage full-cycle recruitment activities, including job posting, sourcing, screening, interviewing, and offer management

  • Partner with hiring managers to understand manpower needs, job requirements, and hiring timelines

  • Develop and execute effective sourcing strategies using job portals, LinkedIn, referrals, agencies, and other channels

  • Build and maintain a strong talent pipeline for current and future hiring needs

Candidate Management

  • Conduct resume screening and initial interviews to assess candidate suitability

  • Coordinate interviews and assessments with hiring managers

  • Ensure a positive candidate experience throughout the recruitment process

  • Prepare and issue offer letters and employment contracts

Stakeholder & Vendor Management

  • Liaise with recruitment agencies and external partners where required

  • Advise hiring managers on market trends, salary benchmarks, and hiring best practices

  • Support onboarding and handover to HR operations teams

Compliance & Reporting

  • Ensure recruitment activities comply with local labor laws and company policies

  • Maintain accurate recruitment records and reports (e.g. time-to-fill, hiring status)

  • Support audits and internal reporting requirements

Employer Branding

  • Support employer branding initiatives to attract talent

  • Represent the company at career fairs, networking events, or recruitment activities as needed

Requirements

  • Diploma or Bachelor’s degree in Human Resources, Business Administration, or related field

  • Minimum 1 year of recruitment or talent acquisition experience (in-house or agency)

  • Familiarity with end-to-end recruitment processes

  • Strong communication and stakeholder management skills

  • Ability to manage multiple roles and priorities in a fast-paced environment

  • Knowledge of local employment regulations (e.g. Singapore MOM guidelines) is an advantage

Preferred Skills

  • Experience hiring technical, operational, or corporate roles

  • Strong communication skills

  • Data-driven mindset with basic recruitment metrics knowledge

postedCompany.description:
Neptune Robotics Pte. Ltd. was established in Singapore in 2024. We provide world-class robotic services by using a World Class Automated Biofouling Management and Robotic Hull Cleaning System.


At Neptune Robotics, we use robotics to reduce maritime fuel consumption and carbon emissions to achieve Net Zero before 2050.


Neptune Robotics provide our clients gateway to the latest and in-depth Shipping Industry Information. Dive into valuable industry insights and professional advice catered to Shipowners, Ship Managers, and Maritime Operators. Discover how our cutting-edge technology transforms operations and maximizes efficiency for a smarter, sustainable maritime future.


Please send your CV to jane.zou@neptune-robotics.com if you are interested in any position.
